sources.title: Evidence synthesis: writing university-grade learning content
sources.locator: Executive conclusion and limitations; sections 4-7, 9, and 12; evidence-to-rule matrix

uses.rightsBasisEvidence: Only evidence conclusions and limitations are used as factual support; the lesson's organization, prose, examples, tables, prompts, and answer logic were independently created. Repository CONTENT-LICENSE.md identifies research prose as CC BY 4.0.

agentAccess.notes: Repository-owned source explicitly supplied for this author run. The repository content license includes research prose, and no access control or term prohibiting agent processing was found. This is a dated observation, not a source-owner warranty.
